description: Trigger ng update scripts for otter dependencies. arg0: package manager (yarn, npm). arg1: optional npm config file path, e.g. '.npmrc-renovate' (only supported for npm and Yarn 1 via NPM_CONFIG_USERCONFIG; for Yarn 2+, configure hostRules instead, see https://docs.renovatebot.com/getting-started/private-packages/#yarn-2).
